category_sources: source_facts.description says Qt Cryptographic Architecture; official KDE API docs describe QCA as a cross-platform crypto API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands QCA; official KDE UserBase and API docs use the name QCA.
docs_sources: Official KDE API documentation is the primary API documentation; official KDE UserBase page links to current online documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official KDE API documentation gives `git clone https://invent.kde.org/libraries/qca.git`.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Qt Cryptographic Architecture; official KDE docs list crypto features including TLS, certificates, hashing, ciphers, and Qt integration.
